html:
2026-0352
2026-04-21FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActAppointment of a part-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade TribunalAppointment of Michèle Govier of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a part-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six months, effective July 6, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Appointment of Michèle Govier of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a part-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six months, effective July 6, 2026.
